action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Miresse, Tenorio, Clancy, Madison, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Anderson, Cruz, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hong, Joers, Johnson, Moore Omokunde, Mursau, Palmeri, Phelps, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs, Taylor and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Carpenter, Larson, Keyeski, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer and Wirch
